provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the partial_openai_fields failure shape common to small local models.

request_tools.name: translate_text
request_tools.description: Translate text into a target language.

note: An OpenAI-ish object omits the outer type and stores arguments as a JSON string; parsing the inner function.name and double-decoding arguments yields the translate_text call with text and target verbatim.
